description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline that uses the global image maven:latest, caches the Maven repository at .m2/repository/ and the build output at target/, and defines MAVEN_CLI_OPTS and MAVEN_OPTS variables. In the build stage add a buildwithsonarqube job that runs only on the master branch, executes `mvn package sonar:sonar -Dsonar.host.url=https://sonar.yourdomain.tld/` and stores the built JAR files (target/*.jar) as artifacts. In the test stage add a codeclimate job using the docker:latest image with a docker:dind service and DOCKER_DRIVER overlay, which pulls the codeclimate image, runs `codeclimate init` and then `codeclimate analyze` to produce codeclimate.json and codeclimate.html artifacts, and also a test job that runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS jacoco:prepare-agent test` followed by a grep command to print the coverage summary, publishing the jacoco-ut site as an artifact. In the performance stage add a performance job using the docker:git image with docker:dind, exporting CI_ENVIRONMENT_URL, setting DOCKER_HOST, downloading the gitlab‑exporter script, running sitespeed.io in Docker to generate performance.json, and publishing that file as an artifact. Add a doc job that generates Javadoc, a deploy job that deletes the old JAR via curl and runs `mvn $MAVEN_CLI_OPTS deploy` (master only), a pages job (alpine:latest) that copies coverage, code quality and Javadoc into a public directory for GitLab Pages (master only), production, staging and review jobs that deploy to environments with manual or branch triggers, a stop_review cleanup job that stops the review environment, and a trigger job (alpine:latest) that installs curl and triggers an external pipeline via API, each with their respective only/except rules and artifacts.
